en.description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a zelkova tree. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Ryōzen-machi Izumihara.

items.name: 駒ヒメ桜
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a cherry tree. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Ryōzen-machi Kamioguni.

items.name: 糠田堂ノ脇乳銀杏
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a ginkgo tree with aerial-root formations. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Tsukidate-machi Nukada.
